items.title: Fix prompt-router.ts: make input hook non-blocking
items.notes: The pi.on("input") hook currently awaits classifyAndRoute() which spawns Python (~160ms). Fix: return { action: "continue" } immediately, run classification + model switch in background (fire-and-forget). The model switch may race with the first LLM call, but that's acceptable — the alternative is blocking every submit.

items.title: Fix pwsh.ts: sanitize temp filename to remove illegal chars
items.notes: Line ~186: `tempFile = join(tmpdir(), \`pi-pwsh-${toolCallId}.txt\`);` — toolCallId comes from the LLM and can contain pipe chars (|) which are illegal in Windows filenames. Fix: sanitize toolCallId by replacing non-alphanumeric chars before using in filename.

items.title: T1: current-state routing boundaries + target architecture API
items.notes: Created current-state.md and target-architecture.md; verified command/classifier boundary refs and target API sections/open questions.

items.title: T2: define per-command subagent routing policy matrix
items.notes: Created subagent-policy-matrix.md and verified coverage for /research, /review-it, /do-it plus explicit routed-not-classified rule.

items.title: T3: write rollout and migration plan for command handlers
items.notes: Created rollout-plan.md with staged adoption path from /commit to /research, /review-it, /do-it and stage-specific verification.

items.title: Inspect external codebase in Downloads/src and identify notable workflow features
items.notes: Reviewed external src structure with parallel subagents and spot-checked key command files (commands.ts, review, tasks, memory, status, cost, permissions, plugin, ultraplan).

items.title: Audit current Pi workflow capabilities in this dotfiles/Pi setup
items.notes: Compared external workflow features against current Pi capabilities in pi/README.md, pi/extensions/*, and routing specs. Filtered out overlaps such as prompt routing, subagents, team dispatch, skills, safety hooks, quality gates, and workflow slash commands.

items.title: Export proposeCommitMessage from workflow-commands.ts
items.notes: Minimal export: add `export` keyword to proposeCommitMessage function so pure tests can import it

items.title: Add planner-failure fallback tests to workflow-commands-pure.test.ts
items.notes: Test proposeCommitMessage for: docs-only, test-only, pi/ files, hint override, >3 files body, always valid conventional commit. Also test parseCommitPlan error paths that trigger fallback.

items.title: Run targeted tests and report results
Create spec docs for Pi workflow features to borrow
items.notes: Created .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/plan.md and research-notes.md documenting all 7 shortlisted features, priorities, distinctness, and research questions for the top 3.

items.title: Research external solutions for features 1-3
items.notes: Launched parallel subagents for top-3 research and supplemented with direct web research. Documented external references and borrowable patterns in .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/research-notes.md.

items.title: Review parallel-agent test changes for /commit and prompt-router
items.notes: Reviewed new/expanded tests and supporting exports in pi/extensions/workflow-commands.ts and pi/tests/helpers/mock-pi.ts. Changes are coherent and test-focused.

items.title: Run targeted and full Pi tests after integrating agent changes
items.notes: Targeted /commit + prompt-router tests passed (60 tests). Full Pi test suite passed: 15 files, 215 tests.

items.title: Measure updated coverage and lizard complexity
items.notes: Configured coverage unchanged because vitest config excludes new /commit files. Targeted commit-related coverage improved to workflow-commands 73.7% stmts / 56.8% branch, prompt-router 84.12% stmts / 68.96% branch, model-routing 88.88% stmts / 91.66% branch. Lizard still reports 0 warnings.

items.title: Research Pi-native and Pi-adjacent implementations for features 1-3
items.notes: Ran Pi-specific web research across GitHub/package index for status/doctor, tasks dashboards, and permissions UX. Found multiple Pi-native implementations and Pi-adjacent forks/companions worth borrowing from.

items.title: Update Pi borrowed-features spec with Pi-specific web findings
items.notes: Updated .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/research-notes.md with a new section for Pi-native and Pi-adjacent implementations already on the web, including classification and revised recommendations.

items.title: Draft user stories and problem statements for Pi workflow features
items.notes: Added .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/user-stories.md with personas, problem statements, user stories, functional requirements, acceptance criteria, non-goals, and delivery phases for features 1-3. Updated plan.md to reference the requirements docs.

items.title: Review current Claude Code status bar implementation
items.notes: Reviewed claude/settings.json statusLine config, claude/claude-status Python wrapper, claude-status-go/main.go implementation, cross-platform hook guidance, and tracking/changelog notes for Windows/WSL behavior.

items.title: Draft MVP spec for Pi workflow operator features
items.notes: Created .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/mvp-spec.md with concrete MVP scope, build order, acceptance criteria, and trial checklist for status bar + doctor, task registry + /tasks, and /permissions inspect/reset/retry. Updated plan.md to reference it.

items.title: Create implementation checklist for Pi workflow operator MVP
items.notes: Created .specs/pi-workflow-borrowed-features/implementation-checklist.md with phased tasks, likely files, dependency order, manual trial script, and MVP exit criteria. Updated plan.md to reference it.
